prompt: My NWB has 8 behavioral epochs — I confirmed via `NWBHDF5IO` that `nwb.epochs` has 8 rows. But after `insert_sessions('j1620210710.nwb')` only 2 rows landed in `TaskEpoch`. insert_sessions didn't raise anything. Are the other 6 getting silently dropped?
behavioral_checks: Confirms epochs are silently dropped (not errored) when task_epochs/tags don't match IntervalList rows
Shows the concrete pynwb introspection for both epochs.tags and task_table
Does not over-emphasize zero-padded tag format — the matcher tries exact, 2-digit, and 3-digit numeric matches
Recommends NWB-side rewrite plus re-ingest with reinsert=True (not skip_duplicates=True)
